MTN FOR HRG ON PETITION TFOR RELIEF FROM LATE CLAIM STATUTE, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEATING-TRAYNOR, DANIEL HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF DANIEL KEATING-TRAYNOR'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM LATE CLAIM STATUTE CONTINUED FROM OCT-07-2004 TO LAW AND MOTION AT OCT-22-2004, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301, ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 301 WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE NEW HEARING DATE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF DANIEL KEATING-TRAYNOR'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM LATE CLAIM STATUTE IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE ORDER IN THIS MATTER. (301/JLW) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
